steps.title: Apply the distributive property
steps.content:
Use the distributive property $$a(b+c)=ab+ac$$ to expand $$15(x+10)$$:
$$15 \cdot x + 15 \cdot 10$$

steps.title: Simplify and select the matching choice
steps.content:
Calculate $$15 \cdot 10 = 150$$ to get $$15x+150$$.
This matches choice B.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
